text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just can't forget about that last race...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The moment when my view was blocked by the
other racers... I felt trapped... like I was
suffocating.
choice_data_list: That's why we're getting first this time!
